landing.heroSubtitle: The all-in-one platform for youth football tournaments
landing.heroDesc: From club registration to hotel assignments, payments and schedules — Goality TMC handles everything so organizers can focus on the game, not the spreadsheets.
landing.productDesc: Goality TMC is a cloud-based tournament management system designed specifically for youth football. We eliminate manual work, reduce errors, and create a seamless experience for organizers, clubs, and players.
landing.vp1Desc: Set up your tournament, add age classes, configure services and open registration — all in under 10 minutes. No IT knowledge required.
landing.vp2Desc: Support for multiple languages (EN / RU / ET), currencies, and international club registration. Built for tournaments worldwide.
landing.vp3Desc: Role-based access control — super admin, org admin, club managers. Your data is safe, your workflow is structured.
landing.orgDesc: Stop juggling spreadsheets, WhatsApp groups, and email threads. Goality TMC gives you a single command center to manage everything — before, during, and after the tournament.
landing.f1Desc: Self-service portal for clubs to register, add teams, upload badges and set login credentials.
landing.f2Desc: Bundle accommodation, meals, transfers and extras into packages with per-team pricing.
landing.f3Desc: Assign rooms to teams, track occupancy, manage check-in/check-out and special requests.
landing.f4Desc: Organize bus routes, assign teams to vehicles, track arrival and departure logistics.
landing.f5Desc: Monitor invoices, record payments, calculate balances and export financial summaries.
landing.f6Desc: Send announcements, updates and tournament info directly to all clubs or specific teams.
landing.f7Desc: Clubs add players, staff and accompanying persons with full profile and medical info.
landing.f8Desc: Match schedule, results and tournament protocols — all in one place for everyone.
landing.f9Desc: Real-time overview of registrations, payments, accommodation — everything in one screen.
landing.f10Desc: Full support for English, Russian and Estonian — automatically adapts to the user's locale.
landing.f11Desc: Super admin, org admin, club manager — each with the exact permissions they need.
landing.f12Desc: Manage multiple tournaments under one organization with shared settings and branding.
landing.p1After: ✅ Digital registration — clubs apply online in 3 minutes
landing.p2After: ✅ Visual room dashboard with drag-and-drop assignment
landing.p3After: ✅ Automatic package pricing, invoices and payment tracking
landing.p4After: ✅ Built-in club inbox with read receipts
landing.p5Before: ❌ No visibility on who paid and how much
landing.p5After: ✅ Real-time financial dashboard with balance per team
landing.p6Before: ❌ Players list collected via PDF forms
landing.p6After: ✅ Clubs manage own rosters — players, staff, medical data
landing.trustQuote: Finally a system that understands what tournament organizers actually need. Setup took 20 minutes, clubs loved the self-service registration.
landing.ctaDesc: Join organizers across the world who trust Goality TMC to deliver flawless tournaments. Free to start, scales with your event.
landing.ctaDisclaimer: No credit card required · Setup in 10 minutes · Cancel anytime

features.heroSubtitle: Goality is the only platform that covers the full tournament organization cycle: from team registration to the final whistle and awards.
features.formatsDesc: 6 ready-made tournament formats — from a simple round-robin to an elite Swiss format with automatic redistribution across groups. Need something custom? Create a custom format from scratch.
features.formatsCheck1: Groups + Playoff — the most popular format
features.formatsCheck2: Round-robin — everyone plays everyone, fair system
features.formatsCheck3: Elite Swiss format — for large top-tier tournaments
features.formatsCheck4: My format — Gold/Silver/Bronze and any custom schemes
features.formatsCheck6: Instant table recalculation when results change
features.formatsElitePlan: Elite and Custom formats — available in Elite plan
features.hubDesc: One screen — all tournament matches in real time. Start matches, record goals, finish games — without leaving the overview.
features.hubCheck1: All live matches with timer on one screen
features.hubCheck2: Quick goal entry — straight from the hub
features.hubCheck3: Filter by division, field, and status
features.hubCheck5: Stats: goals, cards, matches in real time
features.hubCheck6: One operator manages the whole tournament
features.hubPlan: Available in Pro and Elite plans
features.protocolDesc: Full digital protocol with a horizontal timeline. Goals, cards, substitutions — everything recorded in real time. Public page updates instantly.
features.protocolCheck1: Match control: start / half / end / penalties
features.protocolCheck2: Horizontal live timeline with event gradient
features.protocolCheck3: Goals, yellow/red cards, substitutions with player
features.protocolCheck4: Lineups with numbers — loaded before the match
features.protocolCheck5: Public match page with auto-refresh every 8 sec
features.protocolCheck6: History of all events and player stats
features.protocolPlan: Full protocol — Pro and Elite plans
features.lifecycleDesc: Goality covers the full tournament lifecycle. From the first team application to the awards ceremony — in one system.
features.servicesDesc: The organizer can publish all necessary information right on the tournament page — fields, hotels, transfers, services.
features.serviceFieldsDesc: Addresses, map links, notes for each tournament field
features.serviceAccommodationDesc: List of recommended hotels with contacts and prices
features.serviceServicesDesc: Food, kits, equipment — all in one tournament section
features.serviceFinanceDesc: Entry fees, team payments, financial reporting
features.serviceCommunicationDesc: Send messages to all teams or selected ones. Schedule changes, important news — instantly
features.serviceDocumentsDesc: Upload PDF documents directly into the system. Teams download regulations from the tournament page
features.serviceRegistrationDesc: Online registration form, application confirmation, participant management
features.unique1Desc: The only platform that combines registration, format builder, live protocol, finance, and communication in one product. Competitors offer only separate modules.
features.unique2Desc: Tournament from zero to public page — in 10 minutes. No spreadsheets, chats, or manual counting. Everything automatic.
features.unique3Desc: Organizer, club, team, player, and fan — each has their own interface, but all data is shared and updates in real time.
features.unique4Desc: Public pages update every 15 seconds. Fans see the score live — without page reload.
features.unique5Desc: Elite Swiss format, custom phases, Gold/Silver/Bronze tracks — configured in minutes by clicks, without programming.
features.unique6Desc: From 8 teams in a first tournament to 200+ in a federal league. The system works the same at any scale.
features.mockFormat1Desc: Group stage → best teams advance to playoff
features.mockFormat2Desc: Everyone plays everyone. Winner by points
features.mockFormat4Desc: Direct elimination from the first match
features.mockFormat5Desc: Elite Phase → Playoff → Round of 16. For top tournaments
features.mockFormat6Desc: Your own phases, your transition rules. Any schemes

pricing.heroSubtitle: No monthly commitments. Create a tournament — choose a plan — pay. Host once a year or every week — pay only for results.
pricing.heroNote: All tournaments on Goality · First tournament free
pricing.eliteSubDesc: Unlimited number of tournaments, teams and divisions. All Elite features without limits. Profitable from 3-4 tournaments per month.
pricing.extraTeamsNote: Extra teams: 16 teams are included in the base price of Starter, Pro and Elite. For each additional team in the tournament: Starter +€1 · Pro and Elite +€2. One-time payment per tournament.
pricing.calcDesc: No hidden fees. Base price + extra teams above 16 = total per tournament. Use the calculator to estimate your budget.
pricing.marketingDesc: Top of catalog, portal banners, mailing to all club database — a separate story for separate money. Leave your email — be first to know about the launch.
pricing.marketingNoSpam: No spam. Only when we launch.
pricing.marketingFeat3Desc: To all clubs on the platform
pricing.faq1Q: Why pay per tournament, not per month?
pricing.faq1A: Because it is fair. You pay only when you host — whether once a year or once a week. For active organizers, the Elite subscription is better value (€249/mo without limits).
pricing.faq2A: 16 teams are included in the base price of each plan. For each team above 16: Starter +€1, Pro and Elite +€2. One-time payment per tournament.
pricing.faq3A: For leagues and federations hosting many tournaments. €249/mo or €1999/year — all tournaments with no limits on teams, divisions or days. Savings from 3-4 tournaments per month.
pricing.faq4Q: When do I pay for a tournament?
pricing.faq4A: When creating a tournament you choose a plan. Payment via Stripe — card or bank transfer. Tournament activates immediately after payment.
pricing.faq5Q: Can I upgrade from Pro to Elite during a tournament?
pricing.faq5A: Yes, upgrade is available at any time. You pay the difference and immediately get all Elite features.
pricing.faq6Q: What is in the Goality catalog?
pricing.faq6A: The catalog is the main showcase of the platform where teams come looking for tournaments. Starter and above are automatically included in the catalog. Pro — priority placement, Elite — top.
pricing.ctaSubtitle: 12 teams, 1 division, 1 day — all free forever. 2-minute registration.

billing.tournamentPlansDesc: Each tournament is activated separately. Choose a plan when creating or upgrading a tournament.

planGate.upgradeHintNeedPro: For more divisions you need Pro (up to 3) or Elite (unlimited).
planGate.featureMessagingDesc: Send broadcast messages to all registered teams. Keep everyone informed in real time.
planGate.featureMessagingBenefit1: Mass messages to all teams at once
planGate.featureFinanceDesc: Track all payments, issue receipts, manage tournament budget with full financial overview.
planGate.featureMatchHubDesc: Real-time match management, live score updates, and live timeline for all spectators.
planGate.featureDocumentsDesc: Upload and share tournament regulations, schedules, and official documents with teams.
planGate.featureCatalogDesc: Your tournament appears in the Goality public catalog for maximum visibility.
planGate.featureDivisionsDesc: Run multiple age groups, gender categories, or skill divisions in a single tournament.
planGate.featureDivisionsBenefit4: Up to unlimited divisions on Elite
planGate.featureTeamsDesc: Expand your team limit to accommodate larger tournaments with more participants.
planGate.featureEliteFormatsDesc: Advanced formats: Swiss, Champions League, Double Elimination, custom phases. Available in Pro.
planGate.limitTeamsDesc: You've used all available team slots on your current plan. Upgrade to add more teams.
planGate.limitDivisionsDesc: You've reached the maximum number of divisions for your current plan. Upgrade to run more age groups.
planGate.limitExtraTeamsNote: Or buy extra team slots for €{price}/team on the billing page.

legal.privacy1Body: Goality Sport Group OÜ (registry code 17232252) is a company registered in Estonia that operates the Goality TMC platform — a tournament management system for sports organisations. Our registered address is Tallinn, Estonia.
legal.privacy2Item1: Account data: name, email address, profile picture (via Google or Facebook login)
legal.privacy2Item2: Club and team data: club name, city, country, contact information
legal.privacy2Item3: Tournament data: registrations, match results, standings
legal.privacy2Item4: Usage data: page visits, browser type, IP address (via Google Analytics)
legal.privacy3Body: We use your data to provide and improve our services: account authentication, tournament management, communication about your registrations, and platform analytics. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
legal.privacy4Body: We use Google and Facebook for social login (OAuth 2.0). By logging in through these services, you agree to their respective privacy policies. We also use Google Analytics for anonymised usage statistics.
legal.privacy5Body: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active. If you request deletion, we will remove your personal data within 30 days. Some data may be retained longer if required by law.
legal.privacy6Body: For any questions about your personal data or to exercise your rights under GDPR, please contact us:
legal.deletionIntro: You have the right to request deletion of your personal data that Goality Sport Group OÜ holds about you. This page explains how to submit a deletion request.
legal.deletionWhat1: Your account information (name, email, profile picture)
legal.deletionWhat3: Any preferences and settings associated with your account
legal.deletionStep1: If you signed in via Google or Facebook, revoke the Goality app access in your social account settings.
legal.deletionStep2pre: Send a deletion request email to
legal.deletionStep2post: with the subject line "Data Deletion Request" and your account email address.
legal.deletionStep3: We will confirm receipt and process your request within 30 days.
legal.deletionTimeBody: We will process all deletion requests within 30 days of receipt. You will receive a confirmation email when the process is complete.
legal.termsWarningBody: By using Goality TMC you agree to these Terms in full. If you do not agree, you must stop using the platform immediately.
legal.terms1Body: Goality Sport Group OÜ (17232252) ("Goality", "we", "us") provides Goality TMC — a software-as-a-service platform for managing sports tournaments, including team registration, scheduling, results tracking, and communications. We provide the technology platform only. We are not a tournament organiser, sports body, or event operator.
legal.terms2Body: By registering an account, accessing, or using the platform, you confirm that:
legal.terms2Item1: You are at least 18 years of age or have legal authority to act on behalf of an organisation
legal.terms2Item2: You have read and understood these Terms
legal.terms2Item3: You agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes
legal.terms2Item4: If you use the platform on behalf of an organisation, you have authority to bind that organisation to these Terms
legal.terms3Body: As a user of Goality TMC you are solely responsible for:
legal.terms3Item1: The accuracy and legality of all data you enter into the platform (team names, player data, results, etc.)
legal.terms3Item2: Compliance with all applicable laws in your jurisdiction, including data protection, sports regulations, and consumer protection laws
legal.terms3Item3: How you configure, manage, and conduct tournaments using the platform — Goality has no involvement in the actual conduct of tournaments
legal.terms4Title: Disclaimer of Liability for Tournament Operations
legal.terms4Body: Goality TMC is a software tool. We provide infrastructure — we do not participate in, supervise, organise, endorse, or control any tournament, match, event, or activity conducted through the platform.
legal.terms4DisclaimerBody: Goality Sport Group OÜ accepts no responsibility or liability whatsoever for: disputes between clubs, teams, or players; injuries, accidents, or incidents at events; incorrect results entered by users; disqualifications, scheduling errors, or organisational decisions made by tournament operators; any loss, damage, or harm arising from how the platform is used by any party.
legal.terms5Item1: Reverse engineer, copy, or resell the Goality TMC platform or any part of it
legal.terms5Item2: Use the platform to process data for any purpose other than sports tournament management
legal.terms5Item3: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to other users' data or accounts
legal.terms6Body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law:
legal.terms6Disclaimer: Goality Sport Group OÜ shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits, revenue, data, or goodwill, arising out of or in connection with your use of the platform, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages. Our total aggregate liability to you shall not exceed the total fees paid by you to Goality in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.
legal.terms7Body: Goality TMC is a digital subscription service. All payments are processed electronically.
legal.noRefundsBody: In accordance with the EU Consumer Rights Directive (2011/83/EU) Article 16(m), the right of withdrawal does not apply to digital content that has been fully performed with your prior express consent. By activating a paid plan on Goality TMC, you expressly consent to immediate performance and acknowledge that you lose your right of withdrawal. All payments are non-refundable. If you believe there is an error in billing, contact us within 14 days of the charge.
legal.terms8Body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time if you violate these Terms, engage in fraudulent activity, or use the platform in a way that causes harm to others or to Goality. You may cancel your account at any time by contacting us. Termination does not entitle you to a refund of any fees already paid.
legal.terms9Body: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Estonia. Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Estonia. If you are a consumer in the EU, you may also submit a complaint to the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform.

schedule.scheduleSubtitle: Manage stages, draw, matches and results
schedule.scheduleSubtitleDivision: Stages, draw and matches for this division
schedule.noStagesHint: Add group stages (pool play) or knockout stages to define your tournament format.
schedule.noFieldsError: First add fields in the Setup → Fields section
schedule.noGroupStages: No group stages. Create a group stage on the Stages tab.
schedule.noGroupStagesHint: Go to the Stages tab and add a group stage first.
schedule.noGroupsForDrawHint: Open the Stage settings above and create groups.
schedule.drawNoTeamsHint: You can set up groups now. Teams will appear in the pool after registration opens.
schedule.noMatchesHint: Generate matches from the Stages tab after completing the draw.
schedule.generateConfirmDesc: For group / league phases, the Berger algorithm (round-robin) will be applied. For knockout — empty slots for draws.
schedule.noMatches: No matches. Click Generate or add matches manually.
schedule.resultsSubtitle: Enter scores and change match statuses
schedule.noGroupsHint: First set the number of groups in the Format section
schedule.generatedHint: Matches ready! Assign times and fields in the Schedule tab
schedule.autoSchedulerHint: Assign matches to fields and days. The system respects team constraints.
schedule.groupFieldHint: Set which field each group plays on (leave blank for automatic distribution)

conflicts.title: Conflicts
conflicts.unplacedCount: {count} {count, plural, one {match} other {matches}} could not be placed
conflicts.noSlotInWindow: No available slot fits this match's duration on any field within the tournament window.
conflicts.teamNoOverlap: Team #{teamId} is already playing match #{matchId} at this time.
conflicts.fieldNoOverlap: This field is already hosting match #{matchId} at this time.
conflicts.refereeNoOverlap: Referee #{refereeId} is already officiating match #{matchId} at this time.
conflicts.refereeUnavailable: Referee #{refereeId} is not available during this slot.
conflicts.restViolation: Team #{teamId} needs at least {minutes} minutes of rest between matches.
conflicts.teamDayLimit: Team #{teamId} has reached the {cap} matches-per-day limit.
conflicts.stageCompletionOrder: Playoff cannot start yet — group/league match #{matchId} (stage {stageId}) is still ongoing.
conflicts.knockoutRoundOrder: This round cannot start yet — earlier round match #{matchId} (order {round}) must finish first.
conflicts.groupRoundOrder: This round cannot start yet — group {groupId} round {round} match #{matchId} must finish first.
conflicts.fieldStageAffinity: Field {fieldId} is not configured for stage {stageId}.
conflicts.twoLeggedSpacing: Second leg must be at least 48 hours after first leg (match #{peerMatchId}).

hints.title: Suggested fixes
hints.addFieldOrDay: Add more fields or extend the tournament dates.
hints.reduceRestMinutes: Reduce the minimum rest time between team matches.
hints.increaseMaxPerDay: Increase the maximum matches per team per day.
hints.reviewTeamBlackout: Review or remove the team blackout.
hints.reviewRefereeBlackout: Review or remove the referee blackout / availability window.
hints.reviewStadiumHours: Review stadium or field opening hours.
hints.extendHorizonForPlayoff: Extend the tournament date range so playoff has room after group stage.
hints.allowParallelGroupRounds: Enable "allow parallel group rounds" if you want group matches from different rounds to run simultaneously.
hints.addReferee: Add more referees or widen referee availability.
hints.relaxFieldStageAffinity: Relax the field-to-stage affinity to "preferred" or "none".

stageOrder.playoffAfterGroups: Playoff starts automatically after all group/league matches finish.
stageOrder.groupRoundSequential: Group rounds are played sequentially (round 1 before round 2, etc.).
stageOrder.knockoutRoundSequential: Knockout rounds play in order: quarter-finals before semi-finals before final.

schedule.dragToPool: ← Drag here to remove from group
schedule.confirmClearSchedule: Clear the entire schedule? Matches will remain but times and fields will be reset.
schedule.basketsExplain: Baskets let you seed teams by strength before the draw so strong teams end up in different groups.

formatBuilder.pageSubtitle: Configure stages, assign teams, and generate the schedule
formatBuilder.selectFormatSubtitle: Defines the structure — stages, matches and elimination order
formatBuilder.fmtGroupsKnockoutDesc: Group stage → top teams advance to knockout
formatBuilder.fmtRoundRobinDesc: Everyone plays everyone. Winner by points
formatBuilder.fmtKnockoutOnlyDesc: Direct elimination from the first match
formatBuilder.specialEliteDesc: Elite Phase → Playoff Round → Round of 16. For top tournaments with many teams
formatBuilder.specialCustomDesc: Custom phases, custom transition rules. Gold/Silver/Bronze and any other schemes
formatBuilder.lockedEliteDesc: Elite formats are available on Pro and Elite plans.
formatBuilder.structureSubtitle: Set team count, groups and knockout format
formatBuilder.expectedTeamsHint: Target number of teams that will compete in this division
formatBuilder.rrTooManyTeamsWarning: Too many teams for round robin. Consider Groups + Playoff format instead.
formatBuilder.advanceDesc: Top teams from each group → {total} teams total
formatBuilder.lockedPlanLimit: Requires a plan with limit ≥{n} teams
formatBuilder.advancePerGroupHint: How many top teams from each group advance to the playoff
formatBuilder.slotsSubtitle: Preview of match slots — teams are assigned from the Draw tab
formatBuilder.slotsInfoDesc: Schedule is built on abstract slots. Assign teams at any time — swapping teams never breaks the schedule.
formatBuilder.generateSlotNote: Structure will be created with empty slots. Assign teams via Draw tab, then generate match fixtures.
formatBuilder.doneStep1: Go to Draw tab — assign teams to groups
formatBuilder.doneStep2: Go to Fixtures tab — generate match schedule
formatBuilder.doneStep3: Go to Schedule tab — set dates, times and fields
formatBuilder.readyToLaunchDesc: The system will create stages, groups and matches. Then you can set dates and fields.
formatBuilder.generatingWait: This will take a few seconds
formatBuilder.doneDesc: Stages and groups created. Now assign teams and generate match fixtures.
formatBuilder.formatDoneDesc: Stages and groups are ready. Now assign teams via Draw, then generate fixtures.
formatBuilder.changeFormatWarning: Changing the format will delete all existing stages, groups and match data for this division. This action cannot be undone.
formatBuilder.overviewTopQualify: Top {perGroup} from each group → {total} teams in A-bracket
formatBuilder.confirmDeleteFormat: Delete current format? All stages and matches will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

createTournament.mediaHint: You can add a logo and cover photo after creating the tournament
createTournament.servicesHint: These sections will appear in the sidebar and registration form

setupChecklist.title: Tournament Setup

setupChecklist.step_tournament_hint: Name, dates, currency and basic settings
setupChecklist.step_fields_hint: Set up football pitches and locations

stadiums.subFieldsHint: How many sub-fields this venue is split into
stadiums.noStadiumsHint: Add fields to use them when scheduling matches
stadiums.confirmDeleteStadium: Delete field {name}? Matches linked to it will lose their field assignment.

listing.heroDesc: Add your tournament to the Goality catalog — the place where clubs, coaches and players from every corner of the world discover their next competition.
listing.heroNote: Cancel anytime · No setup fee · Active within 24 hours
listing.benefitsDesc: For €4.99/month you get everything to be found, look professional, and grow your tournament year over year.
listing.b1Desc: Your tournament gets a dedicated SEO page on goality.app. Clubs searching for tournaments find you organically — no ad budget needed.
listing.b2Desc: The Goality catalog is actively browsed by clubs, coaches and scouts worldwide. Your listing reaches real people already registered on the platform.
listing.b3Desc: Your page is accessible in English, Russian and Estonian. Reach clubs from the Baltics, Scandinavia, Central the world and beyond.
listing.b4Desc: Get a clean URL like goality.app/catalog/your-tournament. Share it on social media, your website, or in emails.
listing.b5Desc: When Goality grows, you grow with it. We promote the catalog — your tournament benefits from our audience and social presence.
listing.b6Desc: Goality connects organizers, clubs, coaches and players in one ecosystem. Your tournament reaches people who are already here — not anonymous visitors.
listing.s1Desc: Name, dates, city, age groups and a contact link. Takes 5 minutes.
listing.s2Desc: First month at half price. Cancel anytime. No contracts, no hidden fees.
listing.s3Desc: Your listing goes live within 24 hours. Google indexes it in 2–4 weeks.
listing.fw1Desc: You already have a website and your own registration process. You just need more clubs to find you — without rebuilding everything.
listing.fw1c3: Link clubs directly to your site
listing.fw2Desc: First or second year. Build awareness fast and look professional before you have earned the reputation.
listing.fw3Desc: 8–16 teams, regional tournament. You don't need a full management system — just visibility to fill the bracket.
listing.fw3c3: Upgrade when you are ready to grow
listing.upgradeDesc: When you are ready to run your tournament fully online — registration, hotels, payments, match protocols — switch to the full Goality platform. Same account, one click.
listing.trustQuote: Finally a system that understands what tournament organizers actually need. Setup took 20 minutes, clubs loved the self-service registration.
listing.ctaDesc: Join the Goality catalog and put your tournament in front of clubs and coaches across the world. Start for €4.99 — cancel anytime.
listing.ctaNote: No credit card required · Setup in 5 minutes · Cancel anytime
listing.earlyBirdDesc: Lock in the founder price. While spots last.
listing.pubAgeCategories: {count, plural, one {# age category} other {# age categories}}
listing.pubContactToRegister: Contact the organizer directly to register your team.

adminListing.pageDesc: Each listing = one tournament page in the Goality catalog
adminListing.emptyDesc: Create your first tournament listing to appear in the Goality catalog.
adminListing.readyToActivate: Ready to activate — subscribe to go live
adminListing.upgradeDesc: Upgrade to Goality TMC full platform and unlock all tournament management features.
adminListing.deleteConfirm: Delete this listing? This cannot be undone.
adminListing.subscriptionSuccess: Subscription activated! Your listing is now live.
adminListing.editDesc: Changes appear on your public listing page
adminListing.fallbackNote: Empty fields will fall back to English on the public page
adminListing.mediaNote: Cover = hero background · Card image = catalog thumbnail (falls back to cover)
adminListing.datesSection: Dates & Location · same for all languages
adminListing.levelHint: Helps teams find tournaments at the right competitive level
adminListing.contactSection: Contact info · same for all languages
adminListing.socialSection: Social media · same for all languages
adminListing.settingsDesc: Manage logo, name and age groups
adminListing.noAgeGroups: No age groups added yet. Click "Add group" to start.
adminListing.editInfoDesc: This information will be shown on your public listing page
adminListing.divisionsPlaceholder: e.g. U8 Boys, U10 Girls, U12 Mixed
adminListing.photosDesc: Upload photos to showcase your tournament (max {max})
adminListing.noPhotosHint: Upload photos to attract more teams

clubDashboard.title: Club Dashboard
clubDashboard.managersDesc: People who can manage your teams
clubDashboard.inviteDesc: Share this link — they'll create an account and join your club.
clubDashboard.noTeamsHint: Teams are created when you register for a tournament
clubDashboard.findFirstDesc: Browse the Goality catalog to find tournaments and register your teams.
clubDashboard.tournamentsPageDesc: Tournaments your teams are participating in

clubOnboarding.title: Set up your club
clubOnboarding.subtitle: Complete your profile to get started
clubOnboarding.contactHint: This information is only shared with tournament organizers. It will NOT appear on your public club page.
clubOnboarding.publicNote: Only website and social media will be visible publicly

schedulePlanner.heroSubtitle: No spreadsheets. No conflicts. No headaches. Set your fields, hit Generate — and watch your full schedule appear in seconds.
schedulePlanner.mockupSubtitle: Our solver places every match, respects all constraints, and delivers a conflict-free schedule automatically.
schedulePlanner.step1Desc: Set your fields, divisions, and stadium hours
schedulePlanner.step2Desc: One click — solver runs in under 5 seconds
schedulePlanner.step3Desc: Audit, adjust with drag & drop, export
schedulePlanner.f1Desc: Large Neighbourhood Search algorithm. Zero field conflicts, zero team overlaps — mathematically guaranteed.
schedulePlanner.f2Desc: Schedule is a starting point, not a prison. Drag any match to any slot. Conflicts highlight in real time.
schedulePlanner.f3Desc: 3 stadiums, 10 fields, 5 days? Different hours per venue per day? All handled, zero extra effort.
schedulePlanner.f4Desc: Instant quality check: conflicts, rest violations, field utilization, consecutive matches per team. Graded.
schedulePlanner.f5Desc: See every team's matches at a glance. Color-coded rest gaps. Nobody plays back-to-back by accident.
schedulePlanner.f6Desc: U8 through U18, all divisions in one place. Each with its own rules, fields, and schedule.
schedulePlanner.auditDesc: Every potential problem is caught before it reaches the field. No surprises on match day.
auditItems: Detects field and team conflicts instantly
schedulePlanner.ctaSubtitle: Stop fighting spreadsheets. Start running tournaments the smart way.
schedulePlanner.ctaNote: Free plan available · No credit card required · Setup in 5 minutes
